name: Branding Engineer CO.,LTD.
summary: Branding Engineer Co., Ltd. provides recruitment support services in Japan. It offers solutions to support the career of engineers from knowledge acquisition to employment/job change, and independent support; and integrated support for the needs of various companies, such as clients' engineer-related issues, including development orders, selection of human resources necessary for development, in-house IT team start-up management, etc., as well as multi-faceted consulting. The company also provides develops and operates Mayonez, a lifestyle magazine for IT human resources; and Tap-biz, which transmits wisdom and knowledge for business people. In addition, it offers service that supports the career of IT engineers from education to independence. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
